'''Fia''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[hypernautics]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] in [[11 BBY/Legends|11 BBY]] who operated out of the [[Tanquilla Beach/Legends|''Tanquilla Beach'']] [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]]. A graduate of [[Corellia University/Legends|Corellia University's]] [[School of Starship Engineering]], she was an exceptionally skilled engineer who took offense at anyone who questioned her abilities based upon her age or sex. She worked at [[Spang's]], a repair bay run by her grandfather, [[Spang]], and oversaw the [[Engine/Legends|engine]] refit of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' in 8 ABY. During the refit operation, Fia uncovered evidence of trapdoor programming built into the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] by its former owner, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], which had allowed the vessel to be [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotaged]] remotely, necessitating the engine refit to repair the subsequent damage.

==Biography==
Fia, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], was the granddaughter of [[Spang]], a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] who operated out of the [[Tanquilla Beach/Legends|''Tanquilla Beach'']] [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. [[Reproduction/Legends|Born]] in [[11 BBY/Legends|11 BBY]], Fia was a natural [[hypernautics]] engineer who attended [[Corellia University/Legends|Corellia University's]] [[School of Starship Engineering]], graduating in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] at the age of nineteen. She immediately traveled to ''Tanquilla Beach'' to intern with her grandfather in his repair bay, [[Spang's]], which was the largest on the [[Space station/Legends|station]], and the only bay capable of repairing [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]]–sized vessels.<ref name="SD" />

Several [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after Fia arrived on ''Tanquilla Beach'', the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' arrived at the station, seeking repairs to its [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], which had been damaged by [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotage]] and [[Skirmish at Shintel|combat]] in the nearby [[Shintel system/Legends|Shintel system]]. Spang's was the only bay on the station capable of undertaking the needed repairs, but Spang was extremely busy and refused to undertake the work, even going as far as refusing to even meet with the command crew of the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]]. However, the [[Commander/Legends|commanding]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of the ''FarStar'', [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kaiya Adrimetrum]], encountered [[ConJob]], a [[florist]] and [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]] who was good friends with the engineer. ConJob, who had resided on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Siluria III]] recognized Adrimetrum's from her [[Time/Legends|time]] leading the [[Siluria III resistance]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces had [[Death/Legends|killed]] Conjob's family during their occupation of the world, and in return for Adrimetrum's retaliation against them, he persuaded Spang to help the New Republic delegation. Spang relented, and allowed Fia to conduct and oversee the work.<ref name="SD" />

Fia arranged for a portable [[Drydock/Legends|drydock]] to be positioned next to the ''FarStar'', and proceeded to repair the corvette's [[Engine/Legends|engines]], stripping them out a level at a time to overhaul them over the course of two [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]]. While running diagnostics on the engines, Fia detected traces of trapdoor circuitry embedded into the machinery. The ''FarStar'' had previously been part of the [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]] allied to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], former Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] of the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]], and Sarne had intended the vessel to undertake special missions for him. To that end, he had extensively modified the vessel with trapdoor [[Computer/Legends|computer]] programming to ensure that any officer he assigned to command of the vessel would not be able to abscond with the corvette or subvert his authority. That trapdoor circuitry had allowed one of Sarne's agents—[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Palme]]—to upload a computer program into the ''FarStar''{{'s}} systems while the vessel was on [[Shintel]]. The program caused an overload in the ship's engines that burned out the hyperdrive when the ''FarStar'' attempted to jump to lightspeed.<ref name="SD" />

Showing her findings to Captain Adrimetrum, Fia was confident that she could remove the trapdoors in the engines, but admitted she did not have the technical knowledge to search for other trapdoors throughout the ship, and she was certain there would be more embedded in the vessel's other systems. Spang, who had stopped by to see how Fia was faring, mentioned that the work was similar to some he had seen done by [[Slicer/Legends|slicers]] based out of [[Pembric II]]. He advised Adrimetrum to find a man named [[Breslin Drake]] on the planet; Drake had connections all over Pembric II, and he would be able to locate individuals that would be able to help Adrimetrum remove the trapdoors.<ref name="SD" />

After completing work on the ''FarStar''{{'s}} engines, Fia accompanied the ship on a trial run through neighboring [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] to test her work and proclaimed them fully functional. In addition to repairing the engines on the ''FarStar'', Fia managed to upgrade them<ref name="SD" /> from a Class Two hyperdrive<ref name="TDC">''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''</ref> to a Class One.<ref name="SD" />

==Personality and traits==
Fia was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who had short [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]]. A friendly woman, Fia was also a flirt and loved teasing the [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] who frequented Spang's. A fully capable engineer who was confident in her own abilities, Fia also recognized the limitations of her knowledge and was not afraid to admit she did not know how to do something. She took offense to any who questioned her abilities based upon her age, or, even worse, her sex. She was sympathetic to the New Republic and its goals.<ref name="SD" />

A graduate of the Corellian School of Starship Engineering, Fia was a highly skilled engineer, capable of modifying and repairing capital ships, [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], and [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Transport/Legends|transports]]. She was also trained in starfighter weapon repair, and computer programming and repair. Fia could operate [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicles and [[Pilot/Legends|fly]] small vessels. She had a head for business, and her time at the School of Starship Engineering gave her knowledge of [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] culture. She understood some [[Alien/Legends|alien]] languages, and was able to determine the value of objects. She typically wore greasy coveralls and a tool-filled workbelt, and carried a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] and [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]].<ref name="SD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fia appeared in ''[[Shintel Downtime]]'', the fourth [[Roleplaying game|RPG adventure]] in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' by [[West End Games]] which was written by [[Paul Sudlow]] and published in [[1995]]. Although Fia is sympathetic to the New Republic, she will refuse any invitation to join the crew if it is made by one of the players while playing through the scenario. Fia was later namechecked in West End Games' ''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]'', published in [[1997]].
